items.whyItMatters: Widely used gameplay suite that benefits from guided install, safe updates, and settings preservation.
items.installShapeNotes: Mixed script and package suite. One shallow folder is preferred. Existing .cfg files should be preserved during updates.
items.versionRuleNotes: Profile-driven version strategy is active. Local file fingerprint, inside-file clues, and filename clues are all used.
items.latestCheckNotes: Helper-only latest check is supported from the official downloads page.
items.fixtureStatus: Real desktop fixture coverage is in place for base flow and safe apply.
items.referenceNotes: Seeded from the local reviewed special-mod catalog. External Sims mod indexes stay reference-only.

items.whyItMatters: Common support library that other mods depend on, so clear same-version and update checks matter.
items.installShapeNotes: Single script-based support library. Root install is allowed, but one shallow folder is still safe.
items.dependencyNotes: Often required by other mods, so Inbox dependency messages should stay clear.
items.versionRuleNotes: Profile-driven version strategy is active. Noisy runtime values like Python version clues are ignored.
items.latestCheckNotes: Helper-only latest check is supported from the readable official page.
items.fixtureStatus: Real desktop fixture coverage is in place for same-version and older-version checks.
items.referenceNotes: Use the official page as the watch helper. Do not depend on mirrors or challenge-bypass approaches.

items.whyItMatters: Important support library with package-backed installs that exposed false version reads before the rework.
items.installShapeNotes: Support-library install with predictable core files. Root-level install is valid unless the profile later needs stricter handling.
items.dependencyNotes: Acts as a dependency for other mods rather than needing one itself in the current seed rules.
items.versionRuleNotes: Profile-driven version strategy is active. Game patch noise must be ignored. Manifest and local package clues matter more than loose text.
items.latestCheckNotes: Helper-only latest check stays unknown for now because plain app requests hit a challenge page.
items.fixtureStatus: Real desktop fixture coverage is in place for same-version and older-version checks.
items.referenceNotes: Keep waiting for a safe official machine-readable endpoint instead of adding brittle workarounds.

items.whyItMatters: Core support library with a clean official release source that is useful as a stable rule example.
items.installShapeNotes: Predictable support-library layout with shallow install expectations.
items.dependencyNotes: Acts as a dependency for other mods rather than needing one itself in the current seed rules.
items.versionRuleNotes: Profile-driven version strategy is active. Inside-file and filename clues both work well here.
items.latestCheckNotes: Helper-only latest check is supported through the official GitHub releases path.
items.fixtureStatus: Real desktop fixture coverage is in place for same-version and older-version checks.
items.referenceNotes: This is a good example of a safe readable official source for future watch rules.

items.whyItMatters: This mod proved why the version system needed a profile-driven rework instead of more one-off fixes.
items.installShapeNotes: Support-library install with a predictable core file, but version clues can be noisy inside the script payload.
items.dependencyNotes: Acts as a dependency for other Lumpinou mods in practice, so accurate same-version checks matter.
items.versionRuleNotes: Profile-driven version strategy is active. Clean filename clues are preferred and noisy runtime values must be ignored.
items.latestCheckNotes: Helper-only latest check stays unknown for now because the official page is behind a challenge for plain app requests.
items.fixtureStatus: Real desktop fixture coverage is in place for same-version and older-version checks.
items.referenceNotes: Use this profile as the proof case when adding future mods with messy internal version clues.

items.whyItMatters: Support library with predictable install behavior that helps exercise the shared compare path.
items.installShapeNotes: Shallow support-library layout with a stable core install shape.
items.dependencyNotes: Acts as a dependency for related mods rather than needing one itself in the current seed rules.
items.versionRuleNotes: Profile-driven version strategy is active. Local clues are used first and saved state stays fallback-only.
items.latestCheckNotes: Helper-only latest check stays unknown for now because the official page is behind a challenge for plain app requests.
items.fixtureStatus: Real desktop fixture coverage is in place for same-version and older-version checks.
items.referenceNotes: Keep future expansion data-driven so support-library mods like this do not need custom Rust branches.
